title: Eva Opening Song Live
wikitext:
[]: Eva Opening Song Live             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Apr 03, 2007 11:59 am I recently found this video , which is a live version of the opening from Evangelion sung by Youko Takahashi. It's pretty cool. I'm not sure if it's been posted here yet. I thought it was pretty fun to see a live version of the song. I was also wondering if anyone had a higher quality version of this? Preferably one without all the crap on the screen. If you haven't seen it yet, enjoy!

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Apr 03, 2007 5:56 pm Heh, I love her gestures. Like pointing at the audience while saying "shonen". Like she's calling all of them boys. Though maybe they are...

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Tue Apr 03, 2007 7:12 pm she sounds like she's out of breath.

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Tue Apr 03, 2007 9:34 pm slothen wrote: she sounds like she's out of breath.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Wed Apr 04, 2007 10:57 am That wasn't playback. Too sketchy for that. Cool, but you shouldn't dance to this.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Wed Apr 04, 2007 3:55 pm You know hearing that song almost makes me want to go watch Eva again. The key word to that though is almost.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Wed Apr 04, 2007 4:06 pm Hunter21 wrote: You know hearing that song almost makes me want to go watch Eva again. The key word to that though is almost.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Thu Apr 05, 2007 11:22 am Definitley no Ashley Simpson there, real deal. It was good. Like another poster said, it almost makes me want to watch NGE again. But everytime I hear that song it does. :)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Apr 05, 2007 1:50 pm BrikHaus81 wrote: But I'll always be cynical when it comes to the fanwanking.

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Thu Apr 05, 2007 5:39 pm The Japanese sure like some crazy, vibrant colors. It felt like I was watching an episode of Rainbow Bright.

Article: Eva Opening Song Live
[]: Eva Opening Song Live             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Apr 03, 2007 11:59 am I recently found this video , which is a live version of the opening from Evangelion sung by Youko Takahashi. It's pretty cool. I'm not sure if it's been posted here yet. I thought it was pretty fun to see a live version of the song. I was also wondering if anyone had a higher quality version of this? Preferably one without all the crap on the screen. If you haven't seen it yet, enjoy!
